rule: SG/Grok16 is the field compiler — g16 @ gnu++26, field_opt profile, Queen Forge compiler_probe

grok16.role: Field compiler — entropy dispatch, wave phase, FieldX86, NEXUS scoring

fieldc.label: AmmoOS Field Compiler v4
fieldc.note: Sub-layer under Grok16-built RTX — not a substitute for g16

eyeball.rule: Final Eyeball perceive tuned by Grok16 profile — war→vulkan_rtx, dishes→ai, patrol→field_opt
eyeball.witness: grok16_eye_witness on every eye_status and final_eyeball_status

stoard.rule: Eye stoard — secure expanding witness store for compiler receipts

endpoints.GET /api/field/compiler: Grok16 status + Queen forge posture + stoard headroom
endpoints.GET /api/eye/stoard: Stoard status — cap, fill, ledger head
endpoints.POST /api/eye/stoard/witness: Seal field compiler witness into stoard
